---
title: "Supplementary Figure — Leptin Gene Signature (LGS)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r setup_libraries_data}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(patchwork)
library(magrittr)
library(cowplot)

source(here::here("R/basic_processing.R"))
source(here::here("R/analysis_wrappers.R"))

BASE_SIZE <- 8

out_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/supp_lgs/")
tab_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/supp_lgs/tables/")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(tab_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# LGS genes derived from MINT sPLS-DA (see paper/lgs.Rmd)
lgs_genes <- read.csv(here::here("output_figures/paper/lgs/lgs_genes.csv"))
leptin_geneset <- lgs_genes$gene[lgs_genes$value.var < 0]

# Load targets
targets::tar_config_set(store = here::here("_targets"))
targets::tar_load(arc_diet_labeled)
targets::tar_load(pb_alldiet)
targets::tar_load(celltypes_diet)
names(pb_alldiet) <- celltypes_diet

targets::tar_load(arc_lepip)
targets::tar_load(pseudobulk_lepip)
targets::tar_load(celltypes)
names(pseudobulk_lepip) <- celltypes

# Lepr-expressing clusters
DefaultAssay(arc_diet_labeled) <- "RNA"
lepr_exp <- AverageExpression(arc_diet_labeled, features = "Lepr", group.by = "seurat_clusters")
lepclus  <- names(as.data.frame(lepr_exp$RNA))[which(lepr_exp$RNA > 1)]
lepclus  <- lepclus[-5]

lepr_pal  <- c("#B85182", "#9A84B7", "#A0C3E7", "#7B9E6B", "#E8B85D", "#D4A27F")[seq_along(lepclus)]
lepr_cols <- setNames(lepr_pal, lepclus)

all_lepr_labels <- c("Agrp" = "AgRP", "12" = "Lepr/Glp1r", "29" = "POMC",
                      "26" = "Tbx19", "28" = "Irx3")
```

## Panel a — Fast vs DIO logFC anti-correlation across Lepr cell types

```{r panel_a_cross_correlation}
# Run per-cell-type edgeR models to extract per-contrast logFC
pb_objects  <- list()
fit_objects <- list()
deg_results <- list()

for (ct in lepclus) {
    pb_objects[[ct]] <- pb_alldiet[[ct]]
    pb_objects[[ct]]$samples$treatment <- factor(pb_objects[[ct]]$samples$treatment,
                                                  levels = c("Chow", "HFD", "Refeed", "Fast"))
    design <- model.matrix(~treatment + hash_pool, data = pb_objects[[ct]]$samples)
    colnames(design) <- gsub(":", "_", colnames(design))
    pb_objects[[ct]] <- estimateDisp(pb_objects[[ct]], design, robust = TRUE)
    fit <- glmQLFit(pb_objects[[ct]], design, robust = TRUE)
    fit_objects[[ct]] <- fit
    qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 2:4)
    deg_results[[ct]] <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf, p = 0.05)
}

alldeg <- purrr::map_dfr(deg_results, data.frame, .id = "ct")

# Per-cluster Pearson's r: Fast logFC vs HFD logFC (restricted to F-test DEGs)
cor_by_ct <- purrr::map_dfr(lepclus, function(ct) {
    ftest_genes <- alldeg %>% filter(ct == !!ct) %>% pull(gene)
    if (length(ftest_genes) < 10) return(NULL)

    fast_lfc <- topTags(glmQLFTest(fit_objects[[ct]], coef = "treatmentFast"), n = Inf)$table %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC_fast = logFC) %>% filter(gene %in% ftest_genes)
    hfd_lfc  <- topTags(glmQLFTest(fit_objects[[ct]], coef = "treatmentHFD"), n = Inf)$table %>%
        dplyr::select(gene, logFC_hfd = logFC) %>% filter(gene %in% ftest_genes)

    merged <- inner_join(fast_lfc, hfd_lfc, by = "gene")
    ct_test <- cor.test(merged$logFC_fast, merged$logFC_hfd, method = "pearson")

    data.frame(ct = ct,
               ct_label = all_lepr_labels[ct],
               r = ct_test$estimate,
               p = ct_test$p.value,
               n_genes = nrow(merged))
})

write_csv(cor_by_ct, paste0(tab_dir, "fast_hfd_correlation_by_celltype.csv"))

# Scatter plot for Lepr/Glp1r (cluster 12) with annotation
ftest_degs_12 <- alldeg %>% filter(ct == "12") %>% pull(gene)

fast_logfc_12 <- topTags(glmQLFTest(fit_objects[["12"]], coef = "treatmentFast"), n = Inf)$table %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_fast = logFC) %>% filter(gene %in% ftest_degs_12)
hfd_logfc_12  <- topTags(glmQLFTest(fit_objects[["12"]], coef = "treatmentHFD"), n = Inf)$table %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_hfd = logFC) %>% filter(gene %in% ftest_degs_12)

cor_df_12 <- inner_join(fast_logfc_12, hfd_logfc_12, by = "gene")
cor_test_12 <- cor.test(cor_df_12$logFC_fast, cor_df_12$logFC_hfd, method = "pearson")
cor_label_12 <- sprintf("r = %.2f, p = %.2e", cor_test_12$estimate, cor_test_12$p.value)

p_scatter_12 <- ggplot(cor_df_12, aes(logFC_fast, logFC_hfd)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.4, color = lepr_cols["12"]) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_label_12,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.3, size = 2.5) +
    labs(x = "Fasting vs Chow logFC", y = "HFD vs Chow logFC",
         title = "Lepr/Glp1r neurons") +
    theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE)

# Bar plot of r across all Lepr clusters
p_corbar <- ggplot(cor_by_ct, aes(fct_reorder(ct_label, -r), r,
                                   fill = I(lepr_cols[ct]))) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = 2, color = "grey50") +
    theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Pearson's r\n(Fast vs HFD logFC)")

p_corbar + p_scatter_12
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "supp_lgs_a_fast_hfd_correlation.pdf"), h = 3.5, w = 7)
```

## Panel b — HFD vs Leptin IP gene overlap in Lepr/Glp1r neurons

```{r panel_b_hfd_lep_overlap}
# --- Diet: HFD vs Chow in cluster 12 ---
pb_ov_diet <- edger_prep(
    subset(arc_diet_labeled, subset = hash.mcl.ID != "REFED2"),
    celltype_column = "seurat_clusters", trt_group = "treatment", celltypes = "12"
)
pb_ov_diet$samples$treatment <- factor(pb_ov_diet$samples$treatment,
                                       levels = c("Chow", "HFD", "Refeed", "Fast"))
design_ov  <- model.matrix(~treatment + hash_pool, data = pb_ov_diet$samples)
pb_ov_diet <- estimateDisp(pb_ov_diet, design_ov, robust = TRUE)
fit_ov     <- glmQLFit(pb_ov_diet, design_ov, robust = TRUE)
qlf_hfd    <- glmQLFTest(fit_ov, coef = 2)
diet_all   <- topTags(qlf_hfd, n = Inf)$table %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_hfd = logFC, FDR_hfd = FDR)

# --- Leptin: WT response in cluster 12 ---
pb_ov_lep <- pseudobulk_lepip[["12"]]
pb_ov_lep <- pb_ov_lep[, pb_ov_lep$samples$dataset == "lepip" & pb_ov_lep$samples$time != 24]
colnames(pb_ov_lep) <- paste0(colnames(pb_ov_lep), "_", pb_ov_lep$samples$time)
pb_ov_lep$samples$geno      <- factor(pb_ov_lep$samples$geno, levels = c("wt", "mut"))
pb_ov_lep$samples$treatment <- factor(pb_ov_lep$samples$treatment, levels = c("Sal", "Lep"))
pb_ov_lep$samples$time      <- factor(pb_ov_lep$samples$time, levels = c("1", "3", "6"))
design_lep <- model.matrix(~geno + time + treatment + geno:treatment + hash_pool,
                            data = pb_ov_lep$samples)
colnames(design_lep) <- gsub(":", "_", gsub("[()]", "", colnames(design_lep)))
fit_lep    <- voomLmFit(pb_ov_lep, design_lep)
con_lep    <- makeContrasts(WT_Leptin = treatmentLep, levels = design_lep)
fit2_lep   <- contrasts.fit(fit_lep, con_lep)
fit2_lep   <- eBayes(fit2_lep, robust = TRUE)
lep_all    <- topTable(fit2_lep, coef = "WT_Leptin", n = Inf) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_lep = logFC, FDR_lep = adj.P.Val)

# --- Merge with directional consistency ---
overlap_df <- inner_join(diet_all, lep_all, by = "gene") %>%
    mutate(
        same_dir  = sign(logFC_hfd) == sign(logFC_lep),
        sig_group = case_when(
            FDR_hfd < 0.05 & FDR_lep < 0.05 & same_dir  ~ "Concordant",
            FDR_hfd < 0.05 & FDR_lep < 0.05 & !same_dir ~ "Discordant",
            FDR_hfd < 0.05                               ~ "Diet only",
            FDR_lep < 0.05                               ~ "Leptin only",
            TRUE                                         ~ "Neither"
        )
    )

write_csv(overlap_df, paste0(tab_dir, "hfd_lep_overlap_clus12.csv"))

# --- Pearson correlation ---
cor_test  <- cor.test(overlap_df$logFC_hfd, overlap_df$logFC_lep, method = "pearson")
cor_label <- sprintf("r = %.2f, p = %.2e", cor_test$estimate, cor_test$p.value)

p_hfd_lep <- ggplot(overlap_df, aes(logFC_hfd, logFC_lep, color = sig_group)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
        "Concordant"  = "#C0392B",
        "Discordant"  = "#8E44AD",
        "Diet only"   = "#E67E22",
        "Leptin only" = "#2980B9",
        "Neither"     = "grey75"
    )) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_label,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.3, size = 2.5) +
    labs(x = "HFD vs Chow logFC", y = "Leptin vs Saline logFC (WT)",
         color = NULL, title = "Lepr/Glp1r neurons") +
    theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = BASE_SIZE - 1))

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "supp_lgs_b_hfd_lep_correlation.pdf"), plot = p_hfd_lep, h = 4, w = 4)

# --- Fisher's exact test ---
cont_table <- with(overlap_df, table(
    HFD_sig        = FDR_hfd < 0.05,
    Leptin_concord = FDR_lep < 0.05 & same_dir
))
fish_res <- fisher.test(cont_table)

cat("Fisher's exact test — concordant HFD x Leptin DEGs in Lepr/Glp1r neurons\n")
print(cont_table)
cat(sprintf("Odds ratio: %.2f  (95%% CI: %.2f-%.2f)\n",
            fish_res$estimate, fish_res$conf.int[1], fish_res$conf.int[2]))
cat(sprintf("p-value: %.3g\n", fish_res$p.value))
```

## Panel c — AgRP vs Glp1r/Lepr leptin response overlap

```{r panel_c_agrp_glp1r_overlap}
# --- AgRP neurons: WT leptin response ---
pb_a <- pseudobulk_lepip[["Agrp"]]
pb_a <- pb_a[, pb_a$samples$dataset == "lepip" & pb_a$samples$time != 24]
colnames(pb_a) <- paste0(colnames(pb_a), "_", pb_a$samples$time)
pb_a$samples$geno      <- factor(pb_a$samples$geno, levels = c("wt", "mut"))
pb_a$samples$treatment <- factor(pb_a$samples$treatment, levels = c("Sal", "Lep"))
pb_a$samples$time      <- factor(pb_a$samples$time, levels = c("1", "3", "6"))
design_a <- model.matrix(~geno + time + treatment + geno:treatment + hash_pool, data = pb_a$samples)
colnames(design_a) <- gsub(":", "_", gsub("[()]", "", colnames(design_a)))
fit2_a   <- contrasts.fit(voomLmFit(pb_a, design_a),
                          makeContrasts(WT_Leptin = treatmentLep, levels = design_a))
fit2_a   <- eBayes(fit2_a, robust = TRUE)
agrp_all <- topTable(fit2_a, coef = "WT_Leptin", n = Inf) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_agrp = logFC, FDR_agrp = adj.P.Val)

# --- Glp1r/Lepr neurons (cluster 12): WT leptin response ---
pb_g <- pseudobulk_lepip[["12"]]
pb_g <- pb_g[, pb_g$samples$dataset == "lepip" & pb_g$samples$time != 24]
colnames(pb_g) <- paste0(colnames(pb_g), "_", pb_g$samples$time)
pb_g$samples$geno      <- factor(pb_g$samples$geno, levels = c("wt", "mut"))
pb_g$samples$treatment <- factor(pb_g$samples$treatment, levels = c("Sal", "Lep"))
pb_g$samples$time      <- factor(pb_g$samples$time, levels = c("1", "3", "6"))
design_g <- model.matrix(~geno + time + treatment + geno:treatment + hash_pool, data = pb_g$samples)
colnames(design_g) <- gsub(":", "_", gsub("[()]", "", colnames(design_g)))
fit2_g   <- contrasts.fit(voomLmFit(pb_g, design_g),
                          makeContrasts(WT_Leptin = treatmentLep, levels = design_g))
fit2_g   <- eBayes(fit2_g, robust = TRUE)
glp_all  <- topTable(fit2_g, coef = "WT_Leptin", n = Inf) %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, logFC_glp = logFC, FDR_glp = adj.P.Val)

# --- Merge ---
overlap_ag <- inner_join(agrp_all, glp_all, by = "gene") %>%
    mutate(
        same_dir  = sign(logFC_agrp) == sign(logFC_glp),
        sig_group = case_when(
            FDR_agrp < 0.05 & FDR_glp < 0.05 & same_dir  ~ "Concordant",
            FDR_agrp < 0.05 & FDR_glp < 0.05 & !same_dir ~ "Discordant",
            FDR_agrp < 0.05                               ~ "AgRP only",
            FDR_glp  < 0.05                               ~ "Glp1r only",
            TRUE                                           ~ "Neither"
        )
    )

write_csv(overlap_ag, paste0(tab_dir, "agrp_glp1r_leptin_overlap.csv"))

count_df <- overlap_ag %>%
    filter(sig_group != "Neither") %>%
    dplyr::count(sig_group) %>%
    mutate(sig_group = factor(sig_group, c("AgRP only", "Glp1r only", "Concordant", "Discordant")))

cat("Leptin-regulated DEG overlap (AgRP vs Glp1r/Lepr, FDR < 0.05):\n")
print(count_df)

overlap_cols <- c("Concordant"  = "#C0392B",
                  "Discordant"  = "#8E44AD",
                  "AgRP only"   = "#9A84B7",
                  "Glp1r only"  = "#B85182")

p_bar <- ggplot(count_df, aes(sig_group, n, fill = sig_group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.4, size = 2.5) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = overlap_cols) +
    theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 40, hjust = 1)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DEGs")

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "supp_lgs_c_agrp_glp1r_overlap_bar.pdf"), plot = p_bar, h = 4, w = 4)

cor_ag    <- cor.test(overlap_ag$logFC_agrp, overlap_ag$logFC_glp, method = "pearson")
cor_label <- sprintf("r = %.2f, p = %.2e", cor_ag$estimate, cor_ag$p.value)

p_scatter <- ggplot(overlap_ag, aes(logFC_agrp, logFC_glp, color = sig_group)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(overlap_cols, "Neither" = "grey80")) +
    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = cor_label,
             hjust = -0.1, vjust = 1.3, size = 2.5) +
    labs(x = "AgRP logFC (Leptin vs Sal)",
         y = "Glp1r/Lepr logFC (Leptin vs Sal)",
         color = NULL) +
    theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.text = element_text(size = BASE_SIZE - 1))

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "supp_lgs_c_agrp_glp1r_overlap_scatter.pdf"), plot = p_scatter, h = 4, w = 4)

cont_ag  <- with(overlap_ag, table(
    AgRP_sig      = FDR_agrp < 0.05,
    Glp1r_concord = FDR_glp  < 0.05 & same_dir
))
fish_ag <- fisher.test(cont_ag)

cat("\nFisher's exact test — concordant leptin response: AgRP vs Glp1r/Lepr\n")
print(cont_ag)
cat(sprintf("Odds ratio: %.2f  (95%% CI: %.2f-%.2f)\n",
            fish_ag$estimate, fish_ag$conf.int[1], fish_ag$conf.int[2]))
cat(sprintf("p-value: %.3g\n", fish_ag$p.value))
```
